description:
Freestanding A Slimline 45cm Dishwasher - DVS04020S

This space-saving, slimline dishwasher comes with 4 programmes to choose from, including Mini 30' programme which washes a full load in 30 minutes. This model also comes with a Half Load function - perfect for days when there's fewer dishes to wash.

  • Quick Programmes
  • Half load function
  • Removeable cutlery basket
